---
name: Feature Request / Neue Funktion
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement (EN/DE/NL)
title: '[FEATURE]: '
labels: enhancement
assignees: Archie-Automation
---

### 💡 Problem / Problemstellung
*Is your request related to a problem? (e.g. "I find it difficult to...")*

### 🚀 Proposed Solution / Vorgeschlagene Lösung / Gewenste oplossing
*Describe the feature you would like to see. What should happen?*

### 🔄 Alternatives / Alternativen / Alternatieven
*Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds?*

### 📎 Additional Context / Weiterer Kontext / Aanvullende context
*Add any screenshots, sketches, or examples that clarify your idea.*
